Coached by [[Tony Currie (rugby league)|Tony Currie]], the Broncos competed in [[Super League II]] and finished in 2nd place. The club also reached the fifth round of the [[1997 Challenge Cup]] and the Quarter Finals in the [[1997 World Club Championship]]. ==1997 squad statistics== {| class="wikitable sortable"
